data.en: There is paint on Kate's clothes.
data.hint: There is/are 表示某处有某物。

data.en: She has been painting her bedroom.
data.cn: 她一直在粉刷她的卧室。
data.hint: has been painting 表示动作一直在进行且未完成。

data.en: She has painted her bedroom.
data.cn: 她已经粉刷了她的卧室。
data.hint: has painted 表示动作已完成，强调结果。

data.en: My hands are very dirty.
data.hint: very 修饰形容词 dirty。

data.en: I've been repairing my bike.
data.cn: 我一直在修理我的自行车。
data.hint: repairing 强调修理的过程。

data.en: My bike is OK again now.
data.cn: 我的自行车现在又好了。
data.hint: OK again 表示恢复正常。

data.en: I've repaired it.
data.hint: repaired 表示修车动作已经结束并有成效。

data.en: Joe has been eating too much recently.
data.hint: recently 经常用于现在完成进行时。

data.en: Somebody has eaten all the chocolates.
data.cn: 有人把所有的巧克力都吃光了。
data.hint: Somebody 是单三主语，用 has eaten 表示吃完了。

data.en: The box is empty.
data.hint: empty 是形容词，作表语。

data.en: How long have you been reading that book?
data.hint: How long 提问动作持续了多长时间。

data.en: How many pages of that book have you read?
data.hint: How many 提问数量，使用完成时态。

data.en: Amy has been writing emails all morning.
data.cn: 艾米整个上午都在写电子邮件。
data.hint: all morning 表示整个上午，强调过程的持续。

data.en: Amy has sent lots of emails this morning.
data.cn: 艾米今天上午发了许多电子邮件。
data.hint: lots of emails 强调发送的成果/数量。

data.en: They've been playing tennis since two o'clock.
data.cn: 他们从两点起就一直在打网球。
data.hint: since + 具体时间点，使用进行时态强调动作不间断。

data.en: They've played tennis three times this week.
data.cn: 他们本周打过三次网球。
data.hint: three times 强调完成的次数，用完成简单时。

data.en: I've known about the problem for a long time.
data.cn: 我很早以前就知道这个问题了。
data.hint: know 是状态动词，不用于进行时。

data.en: How long have you had that camera?
data.hint: have（拥有）为状态动词，常用 have had。

data.en: I've been meaning to phone Anna.
data.cn: 我一直打算给安娜打电话。
data.hint: mean 可以用于现在完成进行时。

data.en: but I keep forgetting.
data.hint: keep doing sth. 持续做某事。

data.en: He has been reading for two hours.
data.cn: 他已经读了两个小时书了。
data.hint: for + 时间段，配合进行时表示持续。

data.en: He has read fifty-three pages so far.
data.cn: 到目前为止他已经读了五十三页。
data.hint: so far（到目前为止）常与现在完成时连用。

data.en: She is travelling round Europe.
data.hint: travelling 是现在分词，表示正在旅行。

data.en: She has been travelling for three months.
data.hint: travelling 的双写l是英式拼写。

data.en: She has visited six countries so far.
data.cn: 到目前为止她已经访问了六个国家。
data.hint: visit 是瞬间/可数概念，这里强调数量。

data.en: He won the national championship again.
data.cn: 他又赢得了全国锦标赛。
data.hint: won 是 win 的过去式。

data.en: He has won the national championship four times.
data.cn: 他已经赢得过四次全国锦标赛。
data.hint: four times 表示次数，用完成简单时。

data.en: He has been playing tennis since he was ten.
data.cn: 他从十岁起就一直在打网球。
data.hint: since + 时间状语从句。

data.en: They started making films when they left college.
data.cn: 她们大学毕业时开始一起制作电影。
data.hint: start doing sth. 开始做某事。

data.en: They have been making films since they left college.
data.cn: 自大学毕业以来，她们一直在一起制作电影。
data.hint: since 引导的时间状语从句用一般过去时。

data.en: How long have you been learning Arabic?
data.cn: 你学习阿拉伯语多久了？
data.hint: How long 提问学习的持续时间。

data.en: Have you been waiting long?
data.hint: 一般疑问句：Have + 主语 + been + doing...?

data.en: Have you caught any fish?
data.hint: catch 变过去分词 caught，表示钓鱼的结果。

data.en: How many people have you invited?
data.hint: How many people 提问人数量，使用完成时。

data.en: How long have you been teaching?
data.hint: 询问职业工作持续的时间。

data.en: How many books have you written?
data.hint: write 的过去分词是 written。

data.en: How long have you been writing books?
data.hint: 强调写书这门活动的持续时长。

data.en: How long have you been saving?
data.hint: save doing something 可以省去 money。

data.en: How much money have you saved?
data.hint: money 是不可数名词，用 How much 提问。

data.en: Have you ever worked in a factory?
data.cn: 你曾经在工厂工作过吗？
data.hint: Have you ever + 过去分词，询问曾经的经历。

data.en: Somebody has broken that window.
data.hint: 强调现在可见的结果，用完成简单时。

data.en: You look tired.
data.hint: look 作为系动词表示看起来。

data.en: Have you been working hard?
data.hint: 根据对方累的状态，询问最近进行的活动。

data.en: Where has Lisa gone?
data.hint: Where has she gone? 询问去向。

data.en: I've had this book since I was a child.
data.cn: 自孩提时代起我就拥有这本书了。
data.hint: have（拥有）的过去分词是 had。

data.en: I haven't been waiting long.
data.hint: 否定句中 haven't been + -ing。

data.en: You look as if you've been crying.
data.hint: look as if... 看起来好像...

data.en: The children are tired now.
data.hint: are tired 表示现在的状态。

data.en: They've been playing in the garden.
data.cn: 他们一直在花园里玩耍。
data.hint: play in the garden 强调在花园里玩耍的过程。

data.en: I have lost my phone.
data.hint: lost 表示丢失的结果，不用于进行时。
